name: @listen/desktop
description: Listen desktop meeting coach for live call prep, capture, and review.
author: Listen

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/copyRenderer.mjs && node scripts/bundleRealtime.mjs && node scripts/preparePackagedEnv.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run build && node scripts/runElectronBuilder.mjs --publish never
scripts.release: npm run release:check && npm run build && node scripts/runElectronBuilder.mjs --publish always
